meta.title: About Me | Pavel Kalandra — kalandra.tech
meta.description: About Pavel Kalandra — career journey from C# developer to CTO.

hero.name: Pavel Kalandra
hero.subtitle: Software engineer and engineering leader dedicated to building resilient systems and high-performing teams.

manifesto.title: My Manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: Designing systems that don't just work today, but evolve gracefully over time.

pillars.title: Resilient Architecture
pillars.description: Systems that evolve gracefully as business needs shift.

pillars.title: Empowered Teams
pillars.description: Autonomous cultures where every engineer has ownership and a path to mastery.

accordions.title: Allow yourself to scale
accordions.content: Software shouldn't be hard. Every piece of software requires maintenance and learning. If it doesn't make your life easier, build it different. Or don't build it at all. Don't get stuck in maintenance mode. Use your time for building value.

accordions.title: Be happy about your work
accordions.content: Most engineers do this job because they love building. Give them some free time and just watch how they make your software grow. Motivating engineers shouldn't be difficult.

accordions.title: Focus on DX
accordions.content: By applying the two points above, you get a simple implication. Fix what's bothering the engineers and they will make your product better in return. Everybody wins. Everybody's happy.

entries.description: Responsible for overall system architecture, feature design and ways of working.
Didn't stay long, left for a great opportunity as CTO at tickadoo.
Led one-third of engineering, restructuring into product-focused teams and coaching new leaders.

subEntries.description: Single-handedly drove a DX initiative that cut local startup time by 61%, saved 137 GB of database bloat, and overhauled the FuncSharp library — improving hot-path performance and adding stronger type-safety to prevent entire categories of bugs at compile time. Championed culture changes across backend engineering.
Led cross-functional team overseeing billing, reporting, and fiscal compliance. Transitioned to multi-tax systems for global expansion.

entries.description: Managed ASP.NET web application; later migrated from SQL reporting to custom d3.js/Vue.js reporting.
Started as a C# intern during university, progressing through WPF development and CodedUI testing. Built desktop applications and tablet interfaces.
